title: preparedview.regenerate
description: Create a reviewable filesystem plan that regenerates a previously prepared (and possibly removed) project source view from the canonical database. Status: NOT IMPLEMENTED.

view_id.description: Identifier of the PreparedSourceView to regenerate.

plan_id.description: Identifier of the produced ViewRegenerationPlan (a FilesystemPlan with origin prepared_view_regeneration). Regeneration always creates a new plan and never reuses a removal plan.

view.not_found.description: No PreparedSourceView record exists for the supplied view_id.

view.in_use.description: The view already has an in-progress plan (removal or regeneration); finish or cancel it before regenerating.
